summary: Decent audio with good bass and clarity but suffers from reversed stereo channels
review: The recording delivers nice bass response and overall clarity, earning a moderate sound‑quality rating. However, the left/right channels are flipped, which detracts from the listening experience. No comments on the musical performance were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only a single review is available; it praises the bass and clarity but penalizes the stereo reversal, resulting in an overall moderate rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Nice bass and clarity noted, but left/right channels are flipped, affecting stereo imaging.
